news.title:
Yes Bank appoints Vinay Muralidhar Tonse as new MD & CEO.
Tonse previously held a similar role at SBI from Nov 2023-Nov 2025.
news.summary:
Yes Bank appoints Vinay Muralidhar Tonse as new MD & CEO.
Tonse previously held a similar role at SBI from Nov 2023-Nov 2025.

news.title:
Yes Bank saw exceptional trading volume on 5 March 2026 with 1.18 crore shares.
Despite a 0.3% price gain, volume surge and technical signals indicate mixed sentiment.
news.summary:
Yes Bank saw exceptional trading volume on 5 March 2026 with 1.18 crore shares.
Despite a 0.3% price gain, volume surge and technical signals indicate mixed sentiment.

news.title:
YES Bank detects unauthorized transactions on forex cards, blocks and reissues them.
Rising cyber theft highlights increasing risks, even for major banks like YES Bank.
news.summary:
YES Bank detects unauthorized transactions on forex cards, blocks and reissues them.
Rising cyber theft highlights increasing risks, even for major banks like YES Bank.

news.title:
YES Bank detected suspicious transactions on forex cards, blocking e-commerce from a Latin American country.
The bank ensured customer protection, and its shares rose 2.3% to ₹21.21, gaining 22% in the past year.
news.summary:
YES Bank detected suspicious transactions on forex cards, blocking e-commerce from a Latin American country.
The bank ensured customer protection, and its shares rose 2.3% to ₹21.21, gaining 22% in the past year.

news.title:
Yes Bank shares rose 1.7% to Rs 21.07 due to Nifty Bank rebalancing inflows.
RBI summoned Yes Bank over a forex card breach; fraudulent activities restricted to specific BINs.
news.summary:
Yes Bank shares rose 1.7% to Rs 21.07 due to Nifty Bank rebalancing inflows.
RBI summoned Yes Bank over a forex card breach; fraudulent activities restricted to specific BINs.

news.title: YES Bank restricts certain international e-commerce transactions after fraud attempts on prepaid forex cards.
news.summary: YES Bank restricts certain international e-commerce transactions after fraud attempts on prepaid forex cards.

news.title:
Yes Bank identified unauthorized transactions on Feb 24 involving 15 LatAM merchants.
Around 0.28M was approved for 5,000 customers; chargebacks are being initiated.
news.summary:
Yes Bank identified unauthorized transactions on Feb 24 involving 15 LatAM merchants.
Around 0.28M was approved for 5,000 customers; chargebacks are being initiated.

news.title:
Reliance Industries forms a strategic partnership with Facebook for REIL, altering its subsidiary structure and boosting tech focus.
Yes Bank flagged a $0.28M fraud, RVNL and Texmaco secured infra deals, and Lupin faced GST inspection; diverse corporate updates dominate.
news.summary:
Reliance Industries forms a strategic partnership with Facebook for REIL, altering its subsidiary structure and boosting tech focus.
Yes Bank flagged a $0.28M fraud, RVNL and Texmaco secured infra deals, and Lupin faced GST inspection; diverse corporate updates dominate.

news.title:
Yes Bank reports $0.28M fraud on multi-currency forex cards.
Fraud exploited bank IDs; country lacked two-factor authentication.
news.summary:
Yes Bank reports $0.28M fraud on multi-currency forex cards.
Fraud exploited bank IDs; country lacked two-factor authentication.

news.title:
RBI summoned Yes Bank executives over a forex card data breach involving BookMyForex.
Card details, including CVV numbers, of several users were reportedly compromised.
news.summary:
RBI summoned Yes Bank executives over a forex card data breach involving BookMyForex.
Card details, including CVV numbers, of several users were reportedly compromised.

news.title:
Yes Bank's multi-currency forex card with BookMyForex faces increased transaction declines.
Bank implements stringent measures to safeguard impacted prepaid forex card users.
news.summary:
Yes Bank's multi-currency forex card with BookMyForex faces increased transaction declines.
Bank implements stringent measures to safeguard impacted prepaid forex card users.

news.title:
Yes Bank detects $280,000 unauthorised transactions in forex cards.
The issue involves multi-currency prepaid forex cards flagged on Feb 26.
news.summary:
Yes Bank detects $280,000 unauthorised transactions in forex cards.
The issue involves multi-currency prepaid forex cards flagged on Feb 26.

news.title:
BookMyForex denies claims of data breach, assures customer funds are safe after alleged unauthorized forex transactions.
Yes Bank blocked transactions from a specific country; affected cards were proactively replaced for uninterrupted access.
news.summary:
BookMyForex denies claims of data breach, assures customer funds are safe after alleged unauthorized forex transactions.
Yes Bank blocked transactions from a specific country; affected cards were proactively replaced for uninterrupted access.

news.title:
BookMyForex, owned by MakeMyTrip, faced a major data breach, defrauding thousands.
Affected users reported issues accessing the platform to secure their forex cards.
news.summary:
BookMyForex, owned by MakeMyTrip, faced a major data breach, defrauding thousands.
Affected users reported issues accessing the platform to secure their forex cards.

news.title:
Yes Bank's investor presentation highlights India's 7.3% GDP growth forecast.
RBI rate cuts improved liquidity; Yes Bank shows digital growth and strong asset quality.
news.summary:
Yes Bank's investor presentation highlights India's 7.3% GDP growth forecast.
RBI rate cuts improved liquidity; Yes Bank shows digital growth and strong asset quality.

news.title:
Yes Bank shared an investor presentation under SEBI Regulation 30, highlighting its Q3FY26 financials and turnaround story.
Key points include India's strong economic growth, Yes Bank's improved asset quality (GNPA 1.5%) and resilience through SMBC's strategic investment.
news.summary:
Yes Bank shared an investor presentation under SEBI Regulation 30, highlighting its Q3FY26 financials and turnaround story.
Key points include India's strong economic growth, Yes Bank's improved asset quality (GNPA 1.5%) and resilience through SMBC's strategic investment.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
YES Bank aims to achieve a 1% ROA by FY26, says CFO.
ROA measures how efficiently banks use assets to generate profit.
news.summary:
YES Bank aims to achieve a 1% ROA by FY26, says CFO.
ROA measures how efficiently banks use assets to generate profit.

news.title: Yes Bank is under investigation by Mumbai Police's EOW for alleged 'closed-loop funding' in loan transactions.
news.summary: Yes Bank is under investigation by Mumbai Police's EOW for alleged 'closed-loop funding' in loan transactions.

news.title:
Yes Bank saw high trading volume on 13 Feb 2026 with 1.56 cr shares traded.
Despite activity, the stock extended its downtrend due to sector underperformance.
news.summary:
Yes Bank saw high trading volume on 13 Feb 2026 with 1.56 cr shares traded.
Despite activity, the stock extended its downtrend due to sector underperformance.
